Motion To Compel Independent Dental Examination Of Cross-Deft Deborah Johnson & For Sanctions; Or In The Alt, To Preclude Testimony Re Alleged Dental Malpractice
Off Calendar Aug-09-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Daniel J. Meagher for cross-defendant and moving party: Joseph Styger D.D.S.
Jesse C. Ralph for cross-complainant and opposing party: Deborah J. Johnson

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Cross-defendant Joseph Styger's motion to compel independent dental examination is granted. Cross-complainant is ordered to complete her physical examination by Frederick Finzen D.D.S., at UCSF School of Dentristry, 707 Parnassus Avenue, San Francisco, California, no later than August 19, 2005. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient time for the examination. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to make a reasonable and good faith effort to informally resolve the matters in dispute and opposed the instant motion without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,013.80 are to be paid on or before August 29, 2005.
MODIFICATION: Date is changed to: August 30, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
